name: Push-Up
description: Keep your body straight and lower your chest to the floor, then push back up. Control the descent.

name: Plank
description: Hold a straight-arm plank position. Engage your core, keep your hips level, and breathe steadily.

name: Mountain Climbers
description: From a plank position, drive your knees toward your chest alternately in a running motion.

name: Squat
description: Feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your hips until thighs are parallel to the floor, then stand back up.

name: Reverse Crunch
description: Lie on your back and lift your knees toward your chest, curling your hips off the floor.

name: Glute Bridge
description: Lie on your back with knees bent. Drive your hips up until your body forms a straight line from knees to shoulders.

name: Burpee
description: Drop into a squat, kick feet back to a plank, do a push-up, return, then jump with arms overhead.

name: Side Plank (Left)
description: Lie on your left side, prop yourself up on your left forearm. Keep your body in a straight line.

name: Side Plank (Right)
description: Lie on your right side, prop yourself up on your right forearm. Keep your body in a straight line.

name: Side Plank (Right)
description: Lie on your right side, prop yourself up on your right forearm. Keep your body in a straight line.
